nasb.text: Then you took your embroidered cloth and covered them, and offered My oil and My incense before them.

esv.text: And you took your embroidered garments to cover them, and set my oil and my incense before them.

cnv.text: 你又拿你的刺繡衣服，蓋在它們身上，並且把我的油和香料都擺在它們面前。

ccb.text: 你给他们穿上锦绣衣服，把我给你的膏油和香料供奉他们。
